summary: hardhat-core typosquat executes curl via install-time child_process
details: Package name 'hardhat-core' mimics the widely-used 'hardhat' Ethereum development framework. The package.json itself contains a lifecycle/install hook invoking require('child_process') and execSync('curl...') at install time — shell-exec of a network fetch directly from a manifest field is not a pattern any legitimate package uses. Combined with the typosquat-on-hardhat naming, this is the canonical npm install-time dropper shape: running `npm install hardhat-core` causes arbitrary shell commands (and whatever the curl'd URL serves) to execute on the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
